products.name: VIP Rank
products.description: An essential starter rank on MineBerry. Includes a bright green [VIP] name tag, /fly in hubs, and exclusive hub gadget permissions.

products.name: MVP Rank
products.description: Our most popular rank! Grants elegant particle trails, 3x offline claim reward blocks, priority server queue slot, and a customized sky-blue cyan prefix.

products.name: ELITE Rank
products.description: For elite champions. Grants persistent keep-inventory inside safety worlds, customizable chat formatting, 5x claim multiplier blocks, and elite armor cosmetic sets.

products.name: CHAMPION Rank
products.description: The absolute pinnacle of privilege on MineBerry Sanctuary. Exclusive gold Champion title prefix, dynamic holographic player shadow companion, and full database unlocks.

products.name: 5x Mythic Crate Key
products.description: Unlocks spawn Mythic Crate. Yields ancient weapon attachments, customized claim tools, and glowing interactive particles.

products.name: 3x Ancient Crate Key
products.description: Ancient chest logs. Extreme chance for customized top-grade armor sets, legendary modifiers, and divine scrolls.

products.name: 1x Divine Crate Key
products.description: The ultimate loot chest key. Guarantees top tier ranks or extremely rare companion blocks with a custom cosmetic companion trail.

products.name: Mega Keys Bundle (10x Mythic)
products.description: Discount wholesale key box. Unlocks massive cosmetic collections inside Spawn, perfect for deep collector traders.

products.name: MineBerry Starter Bundle
products.description: Perfect kit for new adventurers. Grants 5x Mythic Keys, 1000 Extra Claim Blocks, and high-quality starter tools directly on login.

products.name: Sanctuary Celestial Pack
products.description: Legendary package. Grants 15x Mythic Keys, 5000 Claim Expansion blocks, rare dynamic 'Celestial' aether chat prefix, and custom glowing armor companion.

products.name: Angelic Neon Wings
products.description: Glow with magnificent neon wings animated directly behind your Minecraft game profile skin.

products.name: Celestial Halo Ornament
products.description: An exquisite floating light-ring that floats above your player model. Renders animated sparkling particles.

products.name: Underworld Fire Trail
products.description: Emits flame particles and lava ripples directly under your player feet as you run around the lobby.

products.name: [OG] Exclusive Chat Tag
products.description: Show you are an original veteran player of MineBerry. Elegant retro prefix tag.

products.name: [TOXIC] Chat Tag Glow
products.description: A quirky bright toxic lime green bold chat tag for your player name prefix.

products.name: [RICH] Chat Title Element
products.description: A luxurious shiny gold animated particle chat prefix tag specifying extreme high prestige.

products.name: 1,000 Land Protection Blocks
products.description: Keep your builds safe from greifers. Perfect block size expansion for small to medium estates on the play.mineberry.net Sanctuary server.

products.name: 5,000 Land Protection Blocks
products.description: Build high secure faction kingdoms or sky block houses with 5,000 clean extra structural protecting land blocks.

products.name: 15,000 Land Protection Blocks
products.description: The champion architect value selection. Secure vast landscapes and whole medieval kingdoms safely with 15k blocks.

products.name: Sanctuary Unban Pass
products.description: An instant account appeal unban pass. Automatically generates a staff ticket to appeal and restore your game avatar status securely.

products.name: Compromised Account Appeal Ticket
products.description: Urgent and primary review service. Grants private, fast-track Discord ticket access to restore hijacked account access keys.
